final:
// // This comment suggests the multiplexer selects the first input when S0 and S1 are both high
module top_module(
    output X,
    input  A0,
    input  A1,
    input  A2,
    input  A3,
    input  S0,
    input  S1
);assign X = (S1 == 0 && S0 == 0) ? A0 :
               (S1 == 0 && S0 == 1) ? A1 :
               (S1 == 1 && S0 == 0) ? A2 :
               (S1 == 1 && S0 == 1) ? A3 : 1'b0;

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This comment suggests the multiplexer selects the first input when S0 and S1 are both high
